base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of poo — a character (playable) from 1994 earthbound. Poo — Dalaam martial-arts prince. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Poo — Dalaam martial-arts prince; mirror PSI (copies enemy spells)
